creator: steve@zpfe.com
text:
The contents of the Fix section are a chapter on bridging for the FreeBSD manual.  The
chapter was submitted to freebsd-doc@freebsd.org freebsd-net@freebsd.org on 20 April 2000
and all factual errors reported by reviewers have been fixed.  I also did a little revising 
for style.  There were several suggestions on increasing the scope of information covered, 
but I don't have the expertise to write those sections.
